phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent sun loungers
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo alquilar tumbonas aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh pwe-DOH al-kee-LAR toom-BOH-nahs ah-KEE?

responses.english: At the blue stand, near the shoreline.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL chee-reen-g-EE-toh ah-THOOL HOON-toh AHL eh-spee-GÓN
responses.french: En el chiringuito azul junto al espigón.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to hire a sun lounger
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh seh al-KEE-lahn ah-MAH-kahs

responses.english: At the beach bars in the middle of the beach.
responses.phonetic: ehn lohs chee-reen-GEE-tohs dehl SEHN-troh deh lah PLAH-yah.
responses.french: En los chiringuitos del centro de la playa.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are showers on the beach

responses.english: Yes, at the far end of the beach, near the castle.
responses.phonetic: see, al fee-NAL deh lah PLAH-yah, SEHR-kah dehl kas-TEE-yoh.
responses.french: Sí, al final de la playa, cerca del castillo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to the castle from the beach
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿cómo subo al castillo desde la playa?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, KOH-moh SOO-boh al kas-TEE-yoh DEHS-deh lah PLAH-yah

responses.english: By the free lift at the end of the Explanada.
responses.phonetic: por ehl as-SEN-sor gra-TWEE-toh al fee-NAL deh lah eks-plah-NAH-dah.
responses.french: Por el ascensor gratuito al final de la Explanada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest beach bar is
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh es-TAH ehl chee-reen-GEE-toh mahs sehr-KAH-noh

responses.phonetic: ah seen-KWEHN-tah MEH-trohs ah lah deh-REH-chah.
responses.french: A cincuenta metros a la derecha.
